justification: The diff correctly migrates javax.* to jakarta.* and updates Spring Boot to 3.3.13, but it doesn't introduce any Java 21 idioms (records, pattern matching, etc.). It removes deprecated javax.servlet and javax.xml.bind dependencies, but the migration is incomplete as it doesn't update Hibernate to a version compatible with Jakarta EE 10 (Hibernate 5.x doesn't support Jakarta EE 10, and the diff still uses hibernate-core without a version, which might default to an incompatible version). The diff is coherent but lacks Java 21-specific improvements.
